summary:
Claim: Resilience describes the energy storage capacity of orthodontic wires.  
Evidence: - Resilience measures a material’s ability to absorb and release elastic energy during cyclic deformation. - Orthodontic wires rely on reversible deformation to deliver continuous, controlled force to teeth.  
Answer: B
